description: Code generation ladder — Swift, JS/TS, Python, Kotlin, C#, HTML/CSS. CLI-first because coding CLIs (Claude Code / Codex / Gemini CLI) have richer tool-use harnesses than raw API models. v2: learned routing bias — reorders ladder based on historical HarnessScore data per backend.

coding-task.reason: Claude Code — local-first, no token cost, full tool-use harness
OpenAI Codex CLI — comparable harness when Claude Code unavailable
Anthropic API — cloud coder when no CLI is installed
